scripts.fix: pnpm run lint:fix && pnpm run format
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint
scripts.format: pnpm run format:md && pnpm run format:sh && pnpm run format:lua && pnpm run format:py
scripts.format:check: pnpm run format:check:md && pnpm run format:check:sh && pnpm run format:check:lua && pnpm run format:check:py
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:lua && pnpm run lint:md && pnpm run lint:py && pnpm run lint:sh
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm run lint:fix:md && pnpm run lint:fix:py
scripts.lint:py: uv run ruff check . && uv run pyright
